title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Frontend Developer at PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Ludhiana-based team.

About PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd:
PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PolicyBazaar Consulting Pvt Ltd!
